attempts.hypothesis: The first-pass failure was caused by the top module not exposing the control-register enable bit as a child port named enable; expose enable as a combinational alias of timer_enable without changing timer behavior.
attempts.check_build_status: write_and_check pass; arch_build_and_lint pass after rerunning with explicit SV output path
attempts.failure_summary: Black-box evaluation progressed past enable but failed because dut.count was also expected and was not exposed.

attempts.hypothesis: The evaluator also observes the live counter state through a child port named count; expose count as a combinational alias of count_value without changing count timing.
attempts.failure_summary: Black-box evaluation found the AXI count read returned 0 while the exposed count port was 10, indicating the readback mux was gated unexpectedly.

attempts.hypothesis: The simple register interface expects axi_rdata to reflect the selected address continuously; remove the axi_read_en gate from the combinational read mux while preserving state update timing.
